content.question: No primary legislative source or government regulatory document was located that establishes an explicit statutory minimum enrollment threshold (e.g., 'a school with fewer than N students must close' or 'must be reorganized'), as exists in some comparative jurisdictions; it is unclear whether such thresholds operate as informal administrative practice or guidance without statutory force.
content.reduction_path: A systematic search of Nkt. and subordinate ministerial regulations (EMMI rendelet) combined with interviews with tankerület officials and ministry legal advisors regarding current enrollment-threshold practice; or a formal Government of Hungary legal opinion on the question.
